zh.lifeSummary: 當Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery於1510年1月1日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克時，他的父親Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery40歲，母親Lady Eleanor FitzGerald37歲。他於大約1550年與Julia MacCarthy在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1593年1月1日在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼克拉拉享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery于1510年1月1日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克时，他的父亲Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery40岁，母亲Lady Eleanor FitzGerald37岁。他于大约1550年与Julia MacCarthy在爱尔兰庫迪 科克结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1593年1月1日在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼克拉拉享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: McCarthy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Cormac, Niall, Aileen, Brigid, Conor, Declan, Dermod, Dermot, Finbar.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cárthaigh ‘son of Cárthach’, a personal name meaning ‘loving’. This was the name of a ruling family in Munster. In Ireland major branches were distinguished by the following epithets: mór ‘great’ in Kerry, riabhach ‘brindled’ in Carbery, west Cork.

variants.name: McArthy
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cárthaigh, ‘son of Cárthach’. See McCarthy .

variants.name: McCarty
meanings: Irish: variant of McCarthy , reflecting the common southern Irish pronunciation of th.

nameMeanings.name: Reagh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Ute.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Riabhach, which MacLysaght describes as an adjectival surname (meaning ‘gray’ or ‘brindled’) that ‘took the place of an hereditary one’.
Possibly an altered form of German   Rech  .

variants.name: Rech
meanings: from an ancient Germanic personal name, Recho, a short form of a personal name composed with rāhha ‘revenge’.

nameMeanings.name: Cormac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional Irish name, of uncertain origin. It has been a very popular name in Ireland from the earliest times, and in modern times has been taken up in the wider English-speaking world .

nameMeanings.name: Na
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Nathan   and   Nathaniel .

nameMeanings.name: Haoine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern) and German: variant of   Hain  .
Germanized form of Sorbian Hajna or Hajno, a variant of Heine .

variants.name: Hain
meanings: A male name of German origin. It may be an abbreviation of Hainricus, from Heinreich, from root of Henry; or from Old German hain, a grove.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery was born on 1 January 1510, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland, his father, Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery, was 40 and his mother, Lady Eleanor FitzGerald, was 37. He married Julia MacCarthy about 1550, in County Cork, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 1 January 1593, in Clara, County Kilkenny, Ireland, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery est né le 1 janvier 1510, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande, son père, Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor FitzGerald, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Julia MacCarthy environ 1550, à County Cork, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1593, à Clara, County Kilkenny, Irlande, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery am 1. Januar 1510 in Cork, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery 40 und seine Mutter Lady Eleanor FitzGerald 37. Er hat um 1550 in County Cork, Irland Julia MacCarthy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Januar 1593 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Clara, County Kilkenny, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery è nato il il 1 gennaio 1510 nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, il suo padre, Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Lady Eleanor FitzGerald, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Julia MacCarthy circa 1550, nel County Cork, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 1 gennaio 1593, nel Clara, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carberyが1510年1月1日にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクで生まれた時，父Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carberyは40歳，母Lady Eleanor FitzGeraldは37歳であった。約1550年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクでJulia MacCarthyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1593年1月1日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニークラーアで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery(이)가 1510년 1월 1일 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Eleanor FitzGerald(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1550년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크에서 Julia MacCarthy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1593년 1월 1일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 클라라에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.1 January 1510–1 January 1593: 1510 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 1–1593 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 1

pt.1 January 1510–1 January 1593: 1 de janeiro de 1510–1 de janeiro de 1593
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1510, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eleanor FitzGerald, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Julia MacCarthy aproximadamente 1550, em County Cork, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1593, em Clara, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery родился 1 января 1510 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor FitzGerald, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Julia MacCarthy около 1550 г. в местности коунти корк, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 1 января 1593 г. в местности клара, коунти килкенни, Ирландия в возрасте 83 лет.

es.1 January 1510–1 January 1593: 1 de enero de 1510–1 de enero de 1593
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cormac Na Haoine McCarthy Reagh 13th Prince of Carbery nació el 1 de enero de 1510, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, su papá, Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Lady Eleanor FitzGerald, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Julia MacCarthy aproximadamente 1550, en County Cork, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 1 de enero de 1593, en Clara, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, a la edad de 83 años.
